## Description

<!--
Briefly describe the changes introduced by this pull request.
Include context or motivation if relevant.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) specification.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (formatting, linting, and typechecking).
- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally.

<!--
If you selected "Breaking change" above, ensure your commit message includes
`BREAKING CHANGE:` or `!` (e.g., `feat!: new scoped behavior`) so the pipeline
can bump the Major version automatically.
-->
